message:
feat(frankenpandas): expose interval_range_by_periods/step (fd90.271 / br-jmqjv)

Two pandas-equivalent of pd.interval_range() were unreachable from
frankenpandas:

- interval_range_by_periods(start, end, periods, closed) → Vec<Interval>
  matches pd.interval_range(start, end, periods=N, closed=...)
- interval_range_by_step(start, end, step, closed) → Result<Vec<Interval>>
  matches pd.interval_range(start, end, freq=step, closed=...)

Both pair with the Interval / IntervalClosed types exposed in fd90.263.

Top-level only — prelude users typically call cut() / qcut() for
numeric binning.

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
